seo.title: Membership & Curation Channels | HeartLink
seo.description: Explore HeartLink's four ways to join, from the open Registry Network to a bespoke global search.

hero.title: Access is considered. Never purchased.
hero.description: Anyone may submit a profile to the Registry Network. Families seeking a more active mandate can select the service model that matches the level of search, counsel and principal attention they require.

tiers.label: 01 · Open application
tiers.title: The Registry Network
tiers.description: Anyone may apply to join HeartLink’s protected registry and be considered for founder-reviewed introductions.

tiers.label: 02 · Success based
tiers.title: The Success Tier
tiers.description: No registration or upfront fee. A success fee applies only when your match is made through HeartLink.

tiers.label: 03 · Retained search
tiers.title: The Premium Circle
tiers.description: For clients who retain HeartLink to actively search, advise and work alongside them throughout the mandate.

tiers.label: 04 · Bespoke legacy
tiers.title: The Black Tier
tiers.description: Our highest-touch mandate for exceptional profiles requiring discreet outreach, global search and principal-level stewardship.

protocol.title: A clear model for every kind of search.
paragraphs: The Registry Network is open for profile submissions. Paid channels provide progressively deeper search stewardship; they do not purchase a match or bypass mutual consent.
Terms for the Success, Premium and Black tiers are discussed privately after HeartLink understands the mandate.

closing.quote: Submit a profile or begin a private service conversation.
